ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment objective */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the objective belongs to */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective (e.g., Aggressive Growth, Income) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance (e.g., Aggressive, Conservative) */,
  "time_horizon" TEXT /* Time horizon (e.g., Short Term, Long Term) */,
  "detailed_objective" TEXT /* Detailed investment objective */,
  "additional_risk_metrics" TEXT /* Additional risk tolerance metrics */,
  "investment_horizon_details" TEXT /* Detailed time horizon information */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Investment constraints */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the account belongs to */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the account */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transactions (e.g., Debit, Credit) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, frozen) */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "account_closing_date" TEXT /* Date the account was closed (if applicable) */,
  "account_type_details" TEXT /* Detailed account type information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the transaction belongs to */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Debit, Credit) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Transaction reference number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., bills, investments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the portfolio belongs to */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "aum_range" TEXT /* AUM range of the portfolio */,
  "performance_1yr" REAL /* 1-year performance of the portfolio */,
  "performance_3yr" REAL /* 3-year performance of the portfolio */,
  "performance_mtd" REAL /* Month-to-date performance of the portfolio */,
  "performance_qtd" REAL /* Quarter-to-date performance of the portfolio */,
  "performance_ytd" REAL /* Year-to-date performance of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, under review) */,
  "portfolio_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "portfolio_closing_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was closed (if applicable) */,
  "portfolio_strategy" TEXT /* Portfolio management strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_class" TEXT /* Class of the asset (e.g., Stocks, Bonds) */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, sold) */,
  "asset_source" TEXT /* Source of the asset (e.g., initial investment, dividend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment experience */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the experience belongs to */,
  "investment_experience" TEXT /* Level of investment experience (e.g., Inexperienced, Experienced) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance (e.g., Conservative, Aggressive) */,
  "detailed_experience" TEXT /* Detailed investment experience */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Granular experience level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rebalance_frequency" (
  "rebalance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rebalance frequency */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the rebalance frequency belongs to */,
  "rebalance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of rebalancing (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "last_rebalance_date" TEXT /* Date of last rebalance */,
  "next_rebalance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled rebalance date */,
  "rebalance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rebalancing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rebalance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rebalance_frequency_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_frequency" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review frequency */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the review frequency belongs to */,
  "review_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reviews (e.g., Annually, Quarterly) */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of last review */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled review date */,
  "review_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likelihood_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each likelihood score */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the score belongs to */,
  "likelihood_score" REAL /* Likelihood score */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of the likelihood score (e.g., 01 - Less than 25, 02 - 25 to 50) */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was last updated */,
  "score_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallet_share" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet share */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the wallet share belongs to */,
  "wallet_share" REAL /* Wallet share */,
  "wallet_group" TEXT /* Wallet share group (e.g., 01 - Less than 25, 02 - 25 to 50) */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the wallet share was last updated */,
  "share_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the wallet share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deposits" (
  "deposit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deposit */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the deposit belongs to */,
  "deposit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the deposit */,
  "deposit_date" TEXT /* Date of the deposit */,
  "deposit_reference" TEXT /* Deposit reference number */,
  "deposit_method" TEXT /* Method of deposit (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deposit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the advisor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the advisor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Areas of specialization */,
  "advisor_rating" REAL /* Client rating */,
  "advisor_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisor_clients" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advisor-client relationship */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advisor-client relationship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisor_clients_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisor ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_segment" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing segment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the segment belongs to */,
  "marketing_segment" TEXT /* Marketing segment (e.g., Female Investor, Mass Affluent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing segment */,
  "segment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing segment */,
  "segment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing segment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aum_range" (
  "aum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AUM range */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the AUM range belongs to */,
  "aum_range" TEXT /* AUM range (e.g., 02 - 250k to 500k, 03 - 500k to 750k) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the AUM range */,
  "range_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the AUM range */,
  "range_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the AUM range (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aum_id")
)
